source: Google Business Profile — Grewal RE Group
combined_total_note: 119 Google (Shivraj Grewal / Grewal RE Group GBP) + 3 Zillow + 1 Realtor.com testimonial + 26 Google (Modernaire Group -- a second, distinct Google Business Profile for the same team, same office, same license, zero overlapping reviewer names with the 119) + 40 RateMyAgent (Shivraj Grewal's claimed, license-verified profile, TX #736060). This is the number shown sitewide as the unqualified '189 five-star reviews' / ratingCount / stat total. Any string that specifically says 'on Google' or 'Google reviews' referring to the Grewal RE Group profile correctly stays 119, and any string that says 'on RateMyAgent' stays 40 -- those are true, single-platform counts, not the combined one.
last_sync_status: seed — first automated sync pending key (see scripts/sync_reviews.py). combined_total manually verified live 2026-07-11 via Google Business Profile, Zillow, Realtor.com, and RateMyAgent, plus the Modernaire Group Google listing (Shivraj supplied the live page contents directly; cross-checked against a Birdeye mirror of the same listing, which shows 29 vs. the live 26 -- Birdeye's total includes a duplicate entry, so the live count is used).

checked_no_additional_reviews._note: Verified live 2026-07-11, all at zero (or confirmed duplicate) -- do not add to combined_total unless a real future check finds otherwise.

arsh_khaira._note: Arsh has no reviews yet on his own separate profiles. His Google reviews live under the shared Modernaire Group listing below, not a separate Arsh-only profile.

modernaire_group_other_platforms._note: Same team, same office (2500 Bee Caves Rd Bldg 3 Ste 200), led by Shivraj Grewal and Arsh Khaira -- confirmed via ProvenExpert listing. Checked on Yelp and ProvenExpert specifically: zero reviews on both, distinct from its real Google listing below.

duplicate_links_verified_2026-07-11._note: Shivraj supplied three links to cross-check for double-counting. Two resolved to profiles already in this file (confirmed via place ID match, not re-added); one was a genuinely new platform (added as ratemyagent_grewal below).
duplicate_links_verified_2026-07-11.share.google/iI5PrR2EPPVVE6H2D: Resolves to the primary Grewal RE Group Google Business Profile search card -- same CID 0x865b2d8559b35f0f:0xceb6e8b660270652 as the top-level place_fid above. Same 119 reviews. Not a new source.
Resolves to the Modernaire Group Google Business Profile already documented below -- ludocid 8446122469931415170 converts to the same hex pair 0x7536a7a30db4f682. Same 26 reviews. Not a new source. Its real canonical link (https://www.google.com/maps?cid=8446122469931415170) now replaces the earlier constructed Maps-search-query fallback URL.
duplicate_links_verified_2026-07-11.ratemyagent.com/real-estate-agent/shivra: A genuinely new, separate platform -- claimed profile, license TX #736060 matches Shivraj exactly, 40 reviews, 5.0 average, zero overlap with any Google/Zillow/Realtor.com reviewer already counted. Added as ratemyagent_grewal below.

modernaire_group_google._note: Modernaire Group is our team's previous business name -- this Google Business Profile predates the rebrand to Grewal RE Group and is a real, distinct, still-live listing (same team: Shivraj Grewal + Arsh Khaira, same office). Replies signed 'Modernaire Group (Owner)', some explicitly '- Shivraj & The Modernaire Group'. Zero reviewer-name overlap in review TEXT with the 119 on the current Grewal RE Group profile, though several of the same clients left separate reviews on both profiles under the two different names -- confirmed additive, not duplicated. Place ID re-verified live 2026-07-11 via a Google Search knowledge-panel scrape (ludocid=8446122469931415170, hex 0x7536a7a30db4f682 -- matches this profile exactly, confirming it is not a third/duplicate listing).

modernaire_group_google.birdeye_mirror_count_note: Birdeye shows 29 (includes one duplicate/anonymized entry of a named review) -- the live Google count (26) is used as authoritative.

reviews.author: Dan Rohrer
reviews.text: Shivraj made the process of buying our family's new home tension free. It's so nice to trust that he will work with only your best interests in mind, even if it means losing a sale. I appreciate his people-first philosophy towards his business immensely, he makes it easy to confidently navigate a very big decision.

reviews.author: Siddharth Taduri
reviews.text: Raj has been an incredible Realtor and a great support system through this turbulent market environment. His advise has been incredibly valuable, and Raj handled everything end-to-end with diligence. I highly recommend Raj and colleagues if you are considering a real estate sale/purchase.

reviews.text: I worked with Shivraj from Modernaire Group. It was pleasure working with them on my new home buying process. They made the whole process very easy and helped me throughout each step. I really appreciate Shivraj's patience and acknowledge his knowledge in the real estate market.

reviews.text: Raj is an outstanding real estate agent. After telling Raj exactly what we were looking for he went above and beyond to help us find our dream home. He has great communication skills and responds promptly. We highly recommend Raj for your real estate needs.

reviews.author: pradhyumna kommareddy
reviews.text: Arsh and Modernaire group are a one stop shop for all your realtor needs. Arsh helped me buy my home and has been a great partner and very happy with our decision.

reviews.text: I have had the pleasure of working with Arsh Khaira on several transactions and found him to be a clear communicator and he has always handled himself in a professional manner. He is personable, knowledgeable and easy to do business with.

reviews.text: Worked with Shivraj from Modernaire Group great person to work with ample of knowledge about properties and real estate. He will be my go to realtor in future as well.

reviews.author: Verified client
reviews.title: Excellent Residential Real Estate knowledge, communication, and professionalism.
reviews.text: Based on our experience with Shivraj and the recent sale of our home, we find that Shivraj is very knowledgeable regarding residential real estate in the Bastrop and Austin Texas area. He has demonstrated that he is keenly aware of who is buying, at what price point, and especially at the time of year (December/January) that we placed our home on the market. Communication has been exceptional in terms of content, frequency, and included accurate documentation of discussion and decisions along the way to successful sale of our home. Shivraj impressed us with his professionalism throughout our dealings.

other_platforms._note: Hand-maintained (sync_reviews.py only touches the Google fields above). Text is verbatim from each platform.

reviews.author: chait desai
reviews.detail: Bought a Single Family home in 2026 in Avery Ranch, Austin, TX.
reviews.text: We recently purchased our second home with Shivraj in Austin. The first home is our primary residence and the second home is a rental property. Considering how smooth our experience was during the first purchase, we were completely at ease from the word go. Shivraj made himself available for numerous showings. He has a great gut feeling about any property the moment he steps inside. He'll give you a run down of all pros and cons. He's never too pushy and will always do what is in his client's best interests. A great advantage of working with Shivraj is that the team that he works with is just as top notch: home inspectors, roof inspectors, flooring experts, title company contacts, loan officers, etc. This makes a huge difference to closing quickly and closing on time without any hassle. In our case, Shivraj went the extra mile to also put up the listing for rent for us for no extra cost! That entire process was very streamlined and we were completely hands off. Can't wait to buy our third property with Shivraj!

reviews.author: HeeSun Yu
reviews.detail: Bought a Single Family home in 2024 in Buda, TX.
reviews.text: My goto realtor in Austin. From the beginning, Shrivaj was very attentive, asked a lot of questions and really knew/understood what I was looking for. I'm not from Austin and wasn't around to oversee the building of my house and he was always there for me to send me videos and pictures along the way to give me peace of mind. He's truly genuine and enjoyed working with him. I can't imagine having gone with any other agent.

reviews.author: dervishisuzana02
reviews.detail: Helped buyers purchase a home in Leander, TX.
reviews.text: Shivraj helped us buy our home in Leander, TX. Despite the negotiations with the seller being ongoing and at times difficult, Shivraj kept us calm and focused. He provide guidance, and he worked tirelessly to make sure the process was as smooth as possible. Thanks to him, we were able to successfully buy our home. We would say, choose Shivraj, if you are looking to purchase a home

testimonials.author: Steve Mayo
testimonials.text: After a terrible experience with a real estate agent when selling my previous home, I was hesitant to work with a buyer's agent during my Fall 2024 house hunt. The new rules requiring exclusive agreements just to view an house only made me more frustrated, to the point of focusing only on new construction. After learning I could view properties, sans lock-in, directly with the listing agents or by attending open houses on my own, I reluctantly started looking a resales as the new-construction market is limited. After meeting more than two dozen agents/firms this way, I met Shivraj, and it was clear he was different. He didn't pressure me into signing a contract but instead focused on understanding my needs. Shivraj prioritized helping me, and his genuine approach immediately earned my trust. He showed me about a dozen homes, ran detailed market analyses on several, and submitted three offers on my behalf. Thanks to his expert negotiation, I secured a fair price on a home that perfectly fit my needs. Throughout the process, he was patient, responsive, and incredibly thorough. Shivraj's support didn't end with the purchase. He used his network of professionals to get quotes for repairs, assisted with financing, and made sure the closing process was seamless. Even after the sale, he helped me set up my home's systems, hire reliable contractors, and settle in comfortably. What sets Shivraj apart is his unwavering commitment to his clients. His professionalism, market knowledge, and genuine care transformed what could have been a stressful experience into a smooth and enjoyable one. If you're looking for an agent who truly puts your needs first, I wholeheartedly recommend Shivraj. His dedication goes above and beyond expectations, making him a standout in the real estate world.

reviews_extended_note: Additional real reviews from the primary Grewal RE Group Google profile (same 119 total already counted -- this is a content-completeness addition, not a new count), supplied directly by Shivraj via a full page paste on 2026-07-11. review_count stays 119 -- Google's own aggregate rating for the profile is 5.0, though the full page paste confirmed at least one lower-rated review exists among the 119 (a 2026 review with no text, excluded here since only text-bearing reviews are shown). No individual verify_url is available per review from this source (unlike the featured 3, which have contributor-profile links); the section source line links to the live profile for verification of the full list. 96 of 119 have visible text; the remainder are star-only.
